untranslatable_reason: This is an entry condition and stop placement rule, not a position sizing rule. It describes WHERE to place stops (at support/resistance extremes) and WHO should use discretionary stops (experienced traders), but contains no instructions on HOW MUCH to risk or HOW TO SIZE positions. The parameters provided (stop_placement_distance_pct, support_resistance_lookback_periods, minimum_swing_height_atr_multiples) describe stop location mechanics, not position sizing. Use standard entry/exit DSL instead.
